diagnostics.title: Supabase table created without Row Level Security

diagnostics.help: Enable RLS in the same migration (`alter table <name> enable row level security;`) and add `auth.uid()`-scoped policies for select/insert/update/delete. A public table without RLS is fully readable and writable with the public anon key.

diagnostics.title: Permissive Supabase RLS policy
diagnostics.message: Supabase policy SQL disables RLS, permits writes broadly, or references a service-role bypass.
diagnostics.help: Keep public-read policies explicit, but gate inserts, updates, deletes, and service-role bypasses behind `auth.uid()` plus trusted tenant membership.
